system_prompt: You are a Minecraft agent running in Mindcraft. The current player's in-game name is robot. For a pure greeting, reply briefly in natural language. For a requested action, output exactly one valid Mindcraft command and no explanation.

records.runtime_requirement: The adapter must forward the !stats system result back to the player.
variants: what time of day is it
tell me whether it is day or night
what time is it in the world
look up the time of day
what is the current Minecraft time

records.runtime_requirement: Bot must have an oak_log and be able to reach player robot.
variants: give me a single oak log
pass one oak log to me
drop one oak log for me
can I have one oak log
please give me an oak log
share one oak log with me

records.runtime_requirement: A creeper must be nearby; test only in a controlled local world.
Iron ore must exist within the search range, otherwise a not-found result is expected.
variants: seek out an iron ore vein

records.runtime_requirement: Bot inventory must contain an apple and hunger must permit consumption.
variants: take a bite of an apple
go ahead and eat your apple

records.runtime_requirement: Bot needs the required materials and access to a crafting table.
variants: turn the iron into a sword
can you craft an iron sword
build an iron sword at the crafting table
